/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/translator_app.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/translator_app.dir/main.cpp.o -o translator_app  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN:/media/data/Uchebka/diplom/second wind/app/real_time_translator/3rd_party/screen_capture_lite:" libtranslator_core.a /usr/lib/libpython3.14.so /usr/lib/libcurl.so "/media/data/Uchebka/diplom/second wind/app/real_time_translator/3rd_party/bergamot/libmarian.a" "/media/data/Uchebka/diplom/second wind/app/real_time_translator/3rd_party/bergamot/libssplit.a" "/media/data/Uchebka/diplom/second wind/app/real_time_translator/3rd_party/screen_capture_lite/libscreen_capture_lite_shared.so" -lX11 -lICE -lxcb -lxcb-render -lxcb-shape -ltesseract -larchive -lcurl -lleptonica -lavdevice -lswscale -lavformat -lavcodec -lavutil -lXfixes -lXext /usr/lib/libcurl.so
